Next.js 16 App Router · React Server Components · MongoDB Atlas · Vercel
Vercel Blob · public/ fonts + images + service worker
PR → Preview Deploy | main → Production Deploy
← Response flows back through cache → Edge → Browser → User
WhatsApp PIN delivery · Google Contacts sync · Activity logging · Email notifications · Excel report generation
These run in parallel after the primary mutation — failures are logged, never fatal to the main request
Generated for IPMS v1.0 — Next.js 16 · React 19 · MongoDB Atlas · Vercel · 15 API Routes · 10 Models
